description_long: This is a long, modular fence composed of several connected black panels with thin horizontal rails and vertical posts, likely made of metal and wood. The fence features a section with a gate, distinguishable by its vertical slats and a frame that stands out from the rest of the panels. The main body of the fence consists of uniformly spaced horizontal bars, providing a modern and utilitarian appearance. The posts and rails are slender, with the posts slightly thicker and appearing to be capped flat. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible decorative elements or embellishments. The structure is segmented, suggesting it can be arranged in various configurations to suit different urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or residential boundaries.
description: A modular black fence with thin horizontal rails, flat post caps, and a single integrated gate section. The design is minimalistic and functional, with no decorative elements.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full length of the fence, the gate section on the left, and the arrangement of all panels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thinness of the panels and posts, with the gate section visible as a vertical segment.
description_view_2: Opposite top-down view showing the modular arrangement and the gate section on the far left.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite direction, again emphasizing the slim profile of the fence panels.
